title: selaginella hewittii
intro: Selaginella hewittii, also known as the 'Dwarf Spikemoss' or 'Hewitt's Spikemoss', is a species of vascular plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella hewittii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost immune function, as well as its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. In traditional Chinese medicine, Selaginella hewittii is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its aerial parts are also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and teas.
